params.SpellDescription: CARDNAME deals 4 damage to any target unless that permanent's controller or that player pays {2}. If they do, CARDNAME deals 2 damage to the permanent or player.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: CARDNAME deals 4 damage to any target unless that permanent's controller or that player pays {2}. If they do, CARDNAME deals 2 damage to the permanent or player.
